changeSet.author: hdim
changeSet.comment: Seed 100+ customer leads for GTM launch. Organized by tier: A (warm/known), B (HIEs/ACOs), C (cold qualified). Focus on healthcare organizations that need quality measure/HEDIS solutions. Organization types: ACO, HIE, HEALTH_SYSTEM, PAYER, FQHC, HOSPITAL, CLINIC

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leads WHERE source != 'COLD_OUTREACH'

column.name: notes
column.value: Maine statewide HIE. CRITICAL: Former work connection. 1.4M patients, 35 EHRs integrated. High-value target for quality reporting across state.

column.name: notes
column.value: HealthInfoNet CTO. Technical decision maker. FHIR/interoperability expertise.

column.name: notes
column.value: Aledade is largest ACO enablement company. 2M+ patients across 1000+ practices. HEDIS/quality measures are CRITICAL to their business model. High-value strategic partner.

column.name: notes
column.value: Healthix is largest public HIE in US. 16M patients in NY metro. Quality reporting a major service line. CRITICAL target.

column.name: notes
column.value: Civitas operates multiple state HIEs. NC and growing. Quality infrastructure for Medicaid programs.

column.name: notes
column.value: IHIE is one of oldest, largest HIEs. 15M patient records. Industry leader in quality reporting. Strategic partnership potential.

column.name: notes
column.value: Oklahoma state HIE. 8M records. Medicaid quality reporting needs.

column.name: notes
column.value: athenahealth CMO. EHR vendor with 100M+ patient records. Partnership potential for quality module.

column.name: notes
column.value: ACG (Adjusted Clinical Groups) creator. Quality measurement thought leader. Advisor potential.

column.name: notes
column.value: US National Coordinator. Former MA eHealth Collaborative. FHIR policy. Government connection - not customer but advisor potential.

column.name: notes
column.value: Tech-first MA plan. Star ratings critical for their business. Need to find specific quality leader.

column.name: notes
column.value: Data-driven MA plan. Clover Assistant is their AI play. Quality infrastructure critical.

column.name: notes
column.value: a16z and GV backed MA plan. High-tech approach. Quality measures essential for star ratings.

column.name: notes
column.value: Tech-enabled health plan. Had challenges but quality infrastructure still needed.

column.name: notes
column.value: Former FDA and CMS administrator. Leading VBC policy expert. Advisor potential, connector to health systems.

column.name: notes
column.value: Now part of Amazon/One Medical. Value-based senior care. Quality measures critical.

column.name: notes
column.value: Primary care for seniors. Value-based model. Quality measures essential.

column.name: notes
column.value: Now CVS owned. Medicare-focused primary care. VBC model, quality critical.

column.name: notes
column.value: Medicaid-focused VBC. Underserved communities. Quality measures + SDOH critical.

column.name: notes
column.value: Elevance (Anthem) owned. Medicare ACO model. Quality infrastructure in place but may need upgrade.

column.name: notes
column.value: Colorado statewide HIE. 6M patients. Quality reporting services.

column.name: notes
column.value: Western Colorado HIE. 2M patients. Quality in the name!

column.name: notes
column.value: Kansas statewide HIE. 4M patients. Rural health focus.

column.name: notes
column.value: Maryland + DC HIE. 7M patients. Strong quality reporting history.

column.name: notes
column.value: Connecticut state HIE. New England region - potential with HealthInfoNet connection.

column.name: notes
column.value: Largest integrated system. In-house capability but may have specialty needs.

column.name: notes
column.value: Innovation leader. ProvenCare model. Quality measurement pioneer.

column.name: notes
column.value: Quality leader. Brent James legacy. Clinical decision support pioneers.

column.name: notes
column.value: Large FQHC. UDS reporting requirements. Quality measures for HRSA.

column.name: notes
column.value: LGBTQ+ focused FQHC. Boston area. UDS reporting.

column.name: notes
column.value: Major MA payer. Star ratings critical. Large enterprise, long sales cycle.

column.name: notes
column.value: Largest Medicaid managed care. 28M members. State quality reporting requirements.

column.name: notes
column.value: Medicaid/Medicare dual eligible focus. Quality requirements from states.

column.name: notes
column.value: Tech-forward MA plan. AVA platform. Quality infrastructure needs.

column.name: notes
column.value: New England regional payer. Merged plans may need quality infrastructure consolidation.

column.name: notes
column.value: NYC regional. Hospital-sponsored plan. Quality requirements.

column.name: notes
column.value: NYC regional. GHI + HIP merged. Quality reporting needs.

column.name: notes
column.value: Northern California integrated system. Epic shop. Quality capabilities may be internal.

column.name: notes
column.value: Massive Catholic health system. 140 hospitals. Multiple EHRs = quality challenge.

column.name: notes
column.value: Large Catholic system. 150+ hospitals. VBC initiatives growing.

column.name: notes
column.value: Pacific Northwest major system. Innovation-focused. Digital health initiatives.

column.name: notes
column.value: Top NYC academic medical center. Columbia + Cornell. Research + quality.

column.name: notes
column.value: NYC academic system. Innovation programs. Quality reporting needs.

column.name: notes
column.value: San Diego regional. Integrated delivery system. Quality programs.

column.name: notes
column.value: San Diego non-profit. Quality focus. Mid-sized target.
